name: chinese
description: 中文传统风格，温润典雅

styles.body: font-family: 'Songti SC', 'STSong', 'SimSun', serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 2; color: #2c3e50; padding: 24px; background: #fefaf6;
styles.h1: font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; color: #8b4513; margin: 35px 0 25px; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 2px; border-bottom: 2px solid #d4a574;
styles.p: margin: 20px 0; line-height: 2.2; color: #3c3c3c; text-align: justify; text-indent: 2em;
styles.blockquote: margin: 25px 0; padding: 20px 28px; background: #f9f3ec; border-left: 4px solid #d4a574; color: #6b5944; font-style: normal;
styles.code: font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; background: #f9f3ec; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 3px; color: #c7254e; font-size: 15px;
styles.pre: background: #3c3c3c; color: #f5f2f0; padding: 18px; border-radius: 6px; overflow-x: auto; margin: 25px 0; font-size: 15px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 28px auto; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.15);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 25px 0; border: 1px solid #d4a574;
styles.th: background: #f9f3ec; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #d4a574; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; color: #8b4513;
styles.td: padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #d4a574; text-align: center; color: #3c3c3c;
